message:
refactor(oidc): replace manual token construction with real auth flow in tests

Continue the same pattern from the oauth.rs refactor: extract
issue_token_via_auth_code helper that drives a full OAuth authorization
code grant for OIDC test scenarios instead of manually constructing
OAuthToken structs and inserting them into internal state.

Applied across three tests:
- test_id_token_issuance: obtains real access token, validates it, then
  issues ID token -- exercises the full OIDC pipeline end-to-end
- test_id_token_requires_openid_scope: same flow with profile-only scope
  to verify the MissingOpenIdScope error path
- test_userinfo: replaces inline 30-line OAuth flow with single helper
  call, keeping the test focused on userinfo claims verification

Introduces TEST_CLIENT_ID, TEST_REDIRECT_URI, and TEST_CODE_VERIFIER
constants to reduce string duplication across the test module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
